name: multica-codex-app
description: Bind Codex App work to Multica issues and sync progress back to Multica.

interface.shortDescription: Search, bind, and update Multica issues from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Use the local Multica helper to bind the current Codex App work to a Multica issue, then sync plans, progress, final answers, attachments, and token usage without asking users to start Codex through the Multica CLI.
defaultPrompt: Bind this work to a Multica issue.
Post the final result to Multica.
